zenTribe.pageDesc: Zen Tribe is a Brazilian Zouk movement for dancers who choose presence over performance, connection over applause, and feeling over content.
zenTribe.subtitle: A movement for dancers who choose presence over performance, connection over applause, and feeling over content.

schema.organization_desc: Zen Tribe is a Brazilian Zouk movement and community founded by Zen Eyer for dancers who value presence, connection, slow dancing, and music as a shared emotional experience.

philosophy.title: Some of the most important dances leave almost no evidence.
philosophy.p1: No perfect video, no dramatic ending, no applause. Sometimes there is only a change in the breath, a memory in the skin, a warmth that follows someone home and becomes hard to explain.
philosophy.p2: Zen Tribe exists for dancers who are tired of treating the body as content, proof, product, or performance. In a culture that keeps asking us to accelerate, the slow body becomes a small act of resistance: it chooses sensation over display, attention over metrics, and presence over the pressure to be watched.
philosophy.quote: The dance does not always need to become content. Sometimes the most radical thing a body can do is slow down with another body and pay attention.

zenTribe.selectTier: Start free, stay close to the music, and support the movement only if it feels right.
zenTribe.levelUpDesc: Zen Tribe uses badges and achievements as small rituals of participation, not as pressure to perform. The point is to notice, share, dance, and help the community stay alive without turning every moment into content.
zenTribe.xpDesc: Earn points for meaningful participation: listening, sharing, showing up, supporting releases, and helping other dancers feel welcome.
zenTribe.badgesDesc: Collect badges that mark real moments in the community: first track, first event, first shared memory.
zenTribe.rewardsDesc: Get small benefits like early music access, discounts, private notes, and symbolic recognition inside the Tribe.
zenTribe.streaksDesc: Participation should feel like a rhythm, not an obligation. The Tribe rewards consistency without turning connection into a job.

exclusiveMusic.title: Music Before the Noise
exclusiveMusic.desc: Early access to edits, remixes, and sets made for dancers who want to feel before they perform.

earlyAccess.title: A Calmer Signal
earlyAccess.desc: Updates about selected events, releases, and dance-floor moments without social media urgency.

merchandise.title: Tribe Symbols
merchandise.desc: Access to small objects, merch, and signs of belonging connected to the Zen Tribe philosophy.

community.title: A Place to Slow Down
community.desc: A community for dancers who resist the pressure to turn every dance into a clip, metric, or performance.

vipStatus.title: Symbolic Support
vipStatus.desc: A low-cost way to support the music and help the movement keep breathing.

behindScenes.title: Behind the Sound
behindScenes.desc: Notes from sets, releases, festivals, and the creative process behind the cremosidade.

firstTrack.title: First Track
firstTrack.desc: Listened to your first Zen Tribe track

firstEvent.title: First Event
firstEvent.desc: Shared the floor with the Tribe

legend.title: Tribe Elder
legend.desc: Reached the deepest level of participation

downloadTracks.title: Save 5 Tracks

shareContent.title: Share With Care

cta.title: Choose Presence
cta.subtitle: Join the Zen Tribe if you believe dance can be more than a performance for the camera.
